name: validate_wiki_identity
description: Validates wiki identity contracts. Supports single-file checks and batch session audits (FAIL/WARN/PASS) including stale-content and missing-expected detection.

batch.description: When true, run directory-wide batch audit.

path.description: Path to one wiki .md file in single-file mode.

dir.description: Directory to audit in batch mode (default: dashboard/public/wikis).

expected_mp_id.description: Optional expected UUIDs. In single-file mode first item is used. In batch mode all are checked for missing/orphan detection.

session_start.description: ISO-8601 session start timestamp for stale-content warnings in batch mode.
